basic_details.job_title: TSCAB Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Telangana State Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. (TSCAB)
basic_details.short_information: Telangana State Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. (TSCAB) has published the Cooperative Intern Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Cooperative Intern position. Candidates within the age range of 21 to 30 years and holding an MBA or equivalent in Marketing Management, Cooperative Management, Agri Business Management, Rural Development Management, or a 2-year PGDM from an AICTE/UGC accredited institution, with proficiency in computers and Telugu language, are eligible to apply offline at the official website. The application process will be active until 25 May 2026, and candidates c

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age calculation reference date: 01-05-2026

qualification.education_qualification: MBA or equivalent in Marketing Management, Cooperative Management, Agri Business Management, Rural Development Management, 2-year PGDM awarded by AICTE/UGC accredited institution, Proficiency in computer, Proficiency in Telugu language
qualification.details: MBA or equivalent in Marketing Management / Cooperative Management / Agri Business Management / Rural Development Management from a recognized University / Institute approved by Govt. of India or its regulatory bodies OR 2-year PGDM (Post Graduate Diploma in Management) awarded by an educational institution accredited by AICTE / UGC. Mandatory: Proficiency in computer. Proficiency in Telugu language.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Preparation of Merit List based on academic marks Short-listing for Interview Interview Document Verification Final selection on merit basis
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TSCAB Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TSCAB Cooperative Intern position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the TSCAB Cooperative Intern position is 25-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Cooperative Intern role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA or equivalent in Marketing Management, Cooperative Management, Agri Business Management, or Rural Development Management. A 2-year PGDM from an AICTE/UGC accredited institution is also accepted. Proficiency in computer and Telugu is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Cooperative Intern position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 30 years as of 01-05-2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Cooperative Intern post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. ₹ 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the TSCAB Cooperative Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Cooperative Intern role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, preparation of a merit list based on academic marks, short-listing for an interview, the interview itself, document verification, and final selection on a merit basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Cooperative Intern position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the TSCAB located?
faq.answer: The Telangana State Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. (TSCAB) is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500001.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Telangana apply?
faq.answer: The notification specifies proficiency in the Telugu language as mandatory, which may imply a preference for local candidates. However, it's best to check the official notification for any specific state domicile requirements.
